Bot: remove obsolete category Blank templates

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove obsolete category Erroneous transclusions of Portal-puzzle.svg

Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
